title: Bad Piggies Disc (Create: Aeronautics)
description: Swaps out the Cloud Skipper music disc with the Bad Piggies Theme
body:
Replaces the Cloud Skipper Music Disc from Create: Aeronautics with the Bad Piggies theme composed by Ilmari Hakkola.
